courseTitle: Poker Theory and Design of Poker Bots

lectures.title: Introduction
lectures.description: We talk about some general ideas and (fail to) solve Kunh Poker.

lectures.title: Post Flop Strategy
lectures.description: Hand Odds, Pot Odds, Expected Value and Raising

lectures.title: Pre-Flop Strategy
lectures.description: Hand Strength, Range Analysis, VPIP and Basic Bluffing
